name: The Blue
effect: Introduce an unverified customer preference into the record. This card is considered authoritative.

clauses.name: ORIGIN OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If no prior mention of blue exists: The customer is assumed to have always wanted blue.

clauses.name: CONSENSUS EFFECT
clauses.rule: If no one challenges blue in the meeting: Blue is added to the requirements.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS CLAUSE
clauses.rule: Next sprint: The team delivers blue and considers the matter resolved.
